step_rationale: Coagulation cofactor essential for thrombin generation; activated on platelet surface; directly participates in fibrin formation.
mechanism: Factor V acts as a cofactor in the prothrombinase complex to amplify thrombin generation and drive fibrin polymerization during coronary thrombus formation.
